title: flutter-golden-cycle project config
description: Schema for .claude/flutter-golden-cycle.config.json. Reference this file via $schema in your config for IDE completion.

uiPackage.description: Path to the UI/design-system package where goldens live. Use '.' for single-package Flutter projects.

defaultRunApp.description: Path to the app flutter-run uses in Phase 4b for app-layer changes.

defaultRunDevice.description: flutter run -d target. 'chrome' pairs with deterministic per-worktree web ports.

goldenTolerance.description: Cross-OS pixel-diff tolerance. 0.02 (2%) absorbs typical Skia AA drift.

fontAssetPackage.description: Flutter package that owns the font files (for asset-qualified lookup).

commitScopes.description: Allowed Conventional Commit scopes for this repo.

issueSource.description: v0.1 only supports 'manual'. v0.2 will add 'linear' and 'github'.
